townsfolk.name: Clockmaker
townsfolk.ability: You start knowing how many steps from the Demon to its nearest Minion.

townsfolk.name: Dreamer
townsfolk.ability: Each night, choose a player (not yourself or Travellers): you learn 1 good & 1 evil character, 1 of which is correct.

townsfolk.name: Snake Charmer
townsfolk.ability: Each night, choose an alive player: a chosen Demon swaps characters & alignments with you, then is poisoned.

townsfolk.name: Mathematician
townsfolk.ability: Each night, you learn how many players' abilities worked abnormally (since dawn) due to another character's ability.

townsfolk.name: Flowergirl
townsfolk.ability: Each night*, you learn if a Demon voted today.

townsfolk.name: Town Crier
townsfolk.ability: Each night*, you learn if a Minion nominated today.

townsfolk.name: Oracle
townsfolk.ability: Each night*, you learn how many dead players are evil.

townsfolk.name: Savant
townsfolk.ability: Each day, you may visit the Storyteller to learn 2 things in private: 1 is true & 1 is false.

townsfolk.name: Seamstress
townsfolk.ability: Once per game, at night, choose 2 players (not yourself): you learn if they are the same alignment.

townsfolk.name: Philosopher
townsfolk.ability: Once per game, at night, choose a good character: gain that ability. If this character is in play, they are drunk.

townsfolk.name: Artist
townsfolk.ability: Once per game, during the day, privately ask the Storyteller any yes/no question.

townsfolk.name: Juggler
townsfolk.ability: On your first day, publicly guess up to 5 players' characters. That night, you learn how many guesses were correct.

townsfolk.name: Sage
townsfolk.ability: If the Demon kills you, you learn that it is 1 of 2 players.

outsiders.name: Mutant
outsiders.ability: If you are mad about being an Outsider, you might be executed.

outsiders.name: Sweetheart
outsiders.ability: When you die, 1 player is drunk from now on.

outsiders.name: Barber
outsiders.ability: If you died today or tonight, the Demon may choose 2 players (not another Demon) to swap characters.

outsiders.name: Klutz
outsiders.ability: When you learn that you died, publicly choose 1 alive player: if they are evil, your team loses.

minions.name: Evil Twin
minions.ability: You and an opposing player know each other. If the good player is executed, evil wins. Good can't win if you both live.

minions.name: Witch
minions.ability: Each night, choose a player: if they nominate tomorrow, they die. This only applies once, then resets.

minions.name: Cerenovus
minions.ability: Each night, choose a player & a good character: they are mad they are this character tomorrow, or might be executed.

minions.name: Pit-Hag
minions.ability: Each night, choose a player & a character they become (if not in play). If a Demon is made, deaths tonight are arbitrary.

demons.name: Fang Gu
demons.ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. The first Outsider this kills becomes an evil Fang Gu and you die.

demons.name: Vigormortis
demons.ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Minions you kill keep their ability until dead. Outsiders may be added or removed.

demons.name: No Dashii
demons.ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Your two Townsfolk neighbors are poisoned.

demons.name: Vortox
demons.ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Townsfolk abilities yield false info. Each day, if no execution occurs, evil wins.
